controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - concentration risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - concentration risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an 'nbfc'): explanation: the breaches (including draw down of existing sanctioned limits)
controls.control_description:
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to the following Non-Banking Financial
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an 'NBFC'):
Explanation: The breaches (including draw down of existing sanctioned limits), if any, of a
Government owned NBFC as on the date of issuance of these Amendment Directions shall
be allowed to run-off till maturity, subject to the condition that no further exposure is taken
on such obligors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an 'nbfc'): explanation: the breaches (including draw down of existing sanctioned limits)

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to hfc registered with the rbi under the provisions of the nhb act, 1987
controls.control_description:
However, a Government owned NBFC in Middle Layer or Upper Layer
can take exposure beyond the prudential limits, provided such additional exposures are
fully covered by eligible credit risk transfer instruments resulting in zero net incremental
exposures.]
(2) (i) The provisions given in these Directions except paragraph 7, 14, 16, 19, 22 and 23
shall apply to HFC registered with the RBI under the provisions of the NHB Act, 1987;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to hfc registered with the rbi under the provisions of the nhb act, 1987

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to nbfc-ml and nbfc- ul, and those applicable to nbfc-ml shall further apply to nbfc-ul
controls.control_description:
Note: The Directions applicable to NBFC-BL shall also apply to NBFC-ML and NBFC-
UL, and those applicable to NBFC-ML shall further apply to NBFC-UL, unless stated
otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to nbfc-ml and nbfc- ul, and those applicable to nbfc-ml shall further apply to nbfc-ul

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the concentration norms and limits applicable to it based on the layer in which it is classified
controls.control_description:
<image>
1[Provided that a Government owned NBFC shall be guided by the concentration norms
and limits applicable to it based on the layer in which it is classified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the concentration norms and limits applicable to it based on the layer in which it is classified

controls.control_objective: To ensure stand withdrawn
controls.control_description:
Consequently, the
exemptions from concentration norms granted to Government owned NBFCs shall stand
withdrawn.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to stand withdrawn

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear the
meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure the right to appoint majority of the directors or to control the management or policy decisions exercisable by a person or persons acting individually
controls.control_description:
(1) "Control" means the right to appoint majority of the directors or to control the
management or policy decisions exercisable by a person or persons acting individually
or in concert, directly or indirectly, including by virtue of their shareholding or
management rights or shareholders' agreements or voting agreements or in any other
manner (Clause (27) of Section 2 of the Companies Act, 2013).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to the right to appoint majority of the directors or to control the management or policy decisions exercisable by a person or persons acting individually

controls.control_objective: To ensure tier 1 capital as defined at paragraph 4(8) of these directions
controls.control_description:
(2) "Eligible capital base" means Tier 1 capital as defined at paragraph 4(8) of these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to tier 1 capital as defined at paragraph 4(8) of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure two or more (natural or legal) persons who satisfy at least one of the following conditions:
controls.control_description:
(3) "Group of connected counterparties" means two or more (natural or legal) persons
who satisfy at least one of the following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to two or more (natural or legal) persons who satisfy at least one of the following conditions:

controls.control_description:
(ii) Economic interdependence: In establishing connectedness based on economic
interdependence, an NBFC shall consider, at a minimum, the following criteria:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider, at a minimum, the following criteria:

controls.control_objective: To ensure , and the exposure is so significant that the guarantor is likely to default if a claim occurs
controls.control_description:
(b) Where one counterparty has fully or partly guaranteed the exposure of the other
counterparty, or is liable by other means, and the exposure is so significant that the
guarantor is likely to default if a claim occurs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , and the exposure is so significant that the guarantor is likely to default if a claim occurs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be serviced and fully repaid
controls.control_description:
(d) When the expected source of funds to repay the loans of both counterparties is the
same and neither counterparty has another independent source of income from
which the loan may be serviced and fully repaid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be serviced and fully repaid

controls.control_objective: To ensure a credit facility extended by an nbfc to a borrower, by way of term loan, project loan subscription to bonds/debentures/preference shares/equity share
controls.control_description:
(4) "Infrastructure lending" means a credit facility extended by an NBFC to a borrower, by
way of term loan, project loan subscription to bonds/debentures/preference
shares/equity shares in a project company acquired as a part of the project finance
package such that subscription amount to be "in the nature of advance" or any other
form of long term funded facility for exposure in the infrastructure sub-sectors as notified
by the Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry of Finance, Government of India, from
time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a credit facility extended by an nbfc to a borrower, by way of term loan, project loan subscription to bonds/debentures/preference shares/equity share

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as lending to 'high-quality infrastructure projects'
controls.control_description:
<image>
3[Provided that infrastructure lending to projects that meet all the following criteria shall
be classified as lending to 'high-quality infrastructure projects'
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as lending to 'high-quality infrastructure projects'

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a minimum, include: (i) provisions of an escrow / trust and retention account mechanism for ringfencing the cash flows
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at a minimum, include: (i) provisions of an escrow / trust and retention account mechanism for ringfencing the cash flows

controls.control_objective: To ensure the sum of all exposure values of a nbfc-ul measured in terms of paragraph 41, to a counterparty and / or a group of connected counterparties
controls.control_description:
being
restricted from issuing additional debt against or further encumbering the cashflows
and assets of the project without consent of the existing lenders.]
(5) "Large Exposure" means the sum of all exposure values of a NBFC-UL measured in
terms of paragraph 41, to a counterparty and / or a group of connected counterparties,
if it is equal to or above 10 per cent of the NBFC-UL's eligible capital base.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the sum of all exposure values of a nbfc-ul measured in terms of paragraph 41, to a counterparty and / or a group of connected counterparties

controls.control_objective: To ensure a non-deposit taking nbfc referred to in the reserve bank of india (non-operative financial holding company) directions, 2025, issued by the reserve b
controls.control_description:
(6) "NOFHC" means a non-deposit taking NBFC referred to in the Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Operative Financial Holding Company) Directions, 2025, issued by the Reserve
Bank, which holds the shares of a banking company and the shares of all other financial
services companies in its group, whether regulated by the Reserve Bank or by any other
3 Inserted with effect from April 01, 2026 consequent to the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Concentration Risk Management) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated January 1, 2026
<image>
financial regulator, to the extent permissible under the applicable regulatory
prescriptions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a non-deposit taking nbfc referred to in the reserve bank of india (non-operative financial holding company) directions, 2025, issued by the reserve b

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as given in chapter ii of the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy) dir
controls.control_description:
(7) 4["Owned Fund" shall have the same meaning as given in Chapter II of the Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025.]
(8) 5["Tier 1 capital" shall have the same meaning as given in Chapter II of the Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as given in chapter ii of the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms on capital adequacy) dir

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain an external auditor's certificate on completion of the augmentation of capital and submit the same to the department of supervision of the rbi
controls.control_description:
However, for the purpose of concentration norms, the
NBFC shall obtain an external auditor's certificate on completion of the augmentation of
capital and submit the same to the Department of Supervision of the RBI before
reckoning the additions to capital funds.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to obtain an external auditor's certificate on completion of the augmentation of capital and submit the same to the department of supervision of the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place comprehensive board-approved policy on concentration risk management, which shall inter-alia include
controls.control_description:
An NBFC in the base layer shall put in place comprehensive Board-approved policy on
concentration risk management, which shall inter-alia include.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place comprehensive board-approved policy on concentration risk management, which shall inter-alia include

controls.control_objective: To ensure (1) have any exposure (credit and investments including investments in the equity / debt capital instruments) to the promoters / promoter group entiti
controls.control_description:
An NBFC which is held by an NOFHC shall not
(1) have any exposure (credit and investments including investments in the equity / debt
capital instruments) to the Promoters / Promoter Group entities or individuals associated
with the Promoter Group or the NOFHC;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to (1) have any exposure (credit and investments including investments in the equity / debt capital instruments) to the promoters / promoter group entiti

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meanings assigned to those expressions in the reserve bank of india (non-operative financial holding company) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For the purposes of this paragraph, the expression, 'Promoter' and 'Promoter
Group' shall have the meanings assigned to those expressions in the Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Operative Financial Holding Company) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meanings assigned to those expressions in the reserve bank of india (non-operative financial holding company) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place an internal board-approved policy for credit / investment concentration limits for both single borrower / party and single group of borro
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall put in place an internal Board-approved policy for credit / investment
concentration limits for both single borrower / party and single group of borrowers / parties.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place an internal board-approved policy for credit / investment concentration limits for both single borrower / party and single group of borro

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on similar lines as that for nbfc-ml as given at chapter iii
controls.control_description:
Computation of exposure shall be on similar lines as that for NBFC-ML as given at Chapter
III.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on similar lines as that for nbfc-ml as given at chapter iii

controls.control_objective: To ensure review its extant sectoral exposure limits for consumer credit and put in place, board approved limits in respect of various sub-segments under consum
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall review its extant sectoral exposure limits for consumer credit and put in
place, Board approved limits in respect of various sub-segments under consumer credit as
may be considered necessary by the Board as part of prudent risk management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review its extant sectoral exposure limits for consumer credit and put in place, board approved limits in respect of various sub-segments under consum

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit exposures
controls.control_description:
In
particular, limits shall be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing basis by the risk management committee
controls.control_description:
The limits
<image>
so fixed shall be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing basis by the Risk
Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing basis by the risk management committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as unsecured loans for credit appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes
controls.control_description:
All top-up loans extended by an NBFC against movable assets which are inherently
depreciating in nature, such as vehicles, shall be treated as unsecured loans for credit
appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as unsecured loans for credit appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a ceiling of ₹1 crore per borrower for financing subscription to initial public offer (ipo)
controls.control_description:
There shall be a ceiling of ₹1 crore per borrower for financing subscription to Initial
Public Offer (IPO).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a ceiling of ₹1 crore per borrower for financing subscription to initial public offer (ipo)

controls.control_objective: To ensure shift to the state government with applicable risk weight of 20 per cent
controls.control_description:
Chapter III - Guidelines Applicable to NBFC - Middle Layer
Note: To the extent of State Government guarantee used for offsetting exposures
by NBFC-ML, the exposure shall shift to the State Government with applicable risk
weight of 20 per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to shift to the state government with applicable risk weight of 20 per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place comprehensive board-approved policy on concentration risk management, which shall inter-alia include
controls.control_description:
An NBFC in the middle layer shall put in place comprehensive Board-approved
policy on concentration risk management, which shall inter-alia include.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place comprehensive board-approved policy on concentration risk management, which shall inter-alia include

controls.control_objective: To ensure have exposure (credit / investment taken together) exceeding (1) 25 per cent of its tier 1 capital to a single party
controls.control_description:
An NBFC [except (Non-Banking Financial Company-Infrastructure Finance
Company (NBFC-IFC)] shall not have exposure (credit / investment taken together)
exceeding
(1) 25 per cent of its Tier 1 capital to a single party;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have exposure (credit / investment taken together) exceeding (1) 25 per cent of its tier 1 capital to a single party

controls.control_objective: To ensure an nbfc may exceed the exposure norm specified above, by five per cent for any single party and by 10 per cent for a single group of parties
controls.control_description:
and
(2) 40 per cent of its Tier 1 capital to a single group of parties,
Provided that an NBFC may exceed the exposure norm specified above, by five per cent
for any single party and by 10 per cent for a single group of parties, if the additional
exposure is on account of infrastructure loan and / or investment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an nbfc may exceed the exposure norm specified above, by five per cent for any single party and by 10 per cent for a single group of parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure have exposure (credit / investment taken together) exceeding (1) 30 per cent of its tier 1 capital to a single party
controls.control_description:
NBFC-IFC shall not have exposure (credit / investment taken together) exceeding
(1) 30 per cent of its Tier 1 capital to a single party;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have exposure (credit / investment taken together) exceeding (1) 30 per cent of its tier 1 capital to a single party

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined based on the nbfc's latest available financial statements (audited or subject to limited review)
controls.control_description:
(3) 6[The applicable Tier 1 Capital for compliance with the norms stated in paragraphs 13
and 14 above, shall be determined based on the NBFC's latest available financial
statements (audited or subject to limited review).]
(4) 7[The term "Tier 1 Capital" in this context shall be as defined in paragraph 10 of the
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on
Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025."]
6 Inserted with effect from March 10, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Concentration Risk Management) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 dated March 10, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined based on the nbfc's latest available financial statements (audited or subject to limited review)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to an nbfc in respect of investment in the equity capital of an insurance company up to the extent specifically permitted, in writing, b
controls.control_description:
The ceiling on the investment in shares of another company shall not be applicable
to an NBFC in respect of investment in the equity capital of an insurance company up to
the extent specifically permitted, in writing, by the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to an nbfc in respect of investment in the equity capital of an insurance company up to the extent specifically permitted, in writing, b

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to any nbfc not accessing public funds in india, either directly or indirectly and not issuing guarantees
controls.control_description:
Exposure norms shall not apply to any NBFC not accessing public funds in India,
either directly or indirectly and not issuing guarantees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to any nbfc not accessing public funds in india, either directly or indirectly and not issuing guarantees

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to: (1) investments of an nbfc in shares of
controls.control_description:
Exposure norms shall not apply to:
(1) investments of an NBFC in shares of
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to: (1) investments of an nbfc in shares of

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be exempt from exposure norms:
controls.control_description: (3) The exposures listed below shall also be exempt from exposure norms:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be exempt from exposure norms:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated based on the method prescribed for capital computation in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms
controls.control_description:
Aggregate exposure to a counterparty comprising both on and off-balance sheet
exposures shall be calculated based on the method prescribed for capital computation in
the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on
Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 / applicable Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated based on the method prescribed for capital computation in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - prudential norms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned at the outstanding amount (netting is allowed only for assets where provisions for depreciation or for bad and doubtful debts have been ma
controls.control_description:
i.e., on-balance sheet
exposures shall be reckoned at the outstanding amount (netting is allowed only for assets
where provisions for depreciation or for bad and doubtful debts have been made) while the
off-balance sheet exposures shall be converted into credit risk equivalent by applying the
credit conversion factor prescribed under capital requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned at the outstanding amount (netting is allowed only for assets where provisions for depreciation or for bad and doubtful debts have been ma

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be offset with credit risk transfer instruments listed below: (1) cash margin / caution money / security deposit held as collateral on behalf of
controls.control_description:
In addition, the
exposures shall also be offset with credit risk transfer instruments listed below:
(1) Cash margin / caution money / security deposit held as collateral on behalf of the
borrower against the advances for which right to set off is available;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be offset with credit risk transfer instruments listed below: (1) cash margin / caution money / security deposit held as collateral on behalf of

controls.control_objective: To ensure shift to the state government with applicable risk weight of 20 per cent
controls.control_description:
To the extent that a State Government guarantee is used for offsetting exposures by
NBFC-ML, the exposure shall shift to the State Government with applicable risk weight
of 20 per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to shift to the state government with applicable risk weight of 20 per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be direct, explicit, irrevocable and unconditional
controls.control_description:
Provided that to be eligible as a credit risk transfer instrument, guarantees in respect of
paragraphs 20 (2) 20 (3)and 20 (4)above shall be direct, explicit, irrevocable and
unconditional.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be direct, explicit, irrevocable and unconditional

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the exposure by an nbfc to companies / firms / entities in its own group as well as to the borrowers / investee entity's group
controls.control_description:
These ceilings shall be applicable to the exposure by an NBFC to companies / firms
/ entities in its own group as well as to the borrowers / investee entity's group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the exposure by an nbfc to companies / firms / entities in its own group as well as to the borrowers / investee entity's group

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned on the assignor
controls.control_description:
In case of factoring on 'with-recourse' basis, the exposure shall be reckoned on the
assignor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned on the assignor

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned on the debtor, irrespective of credit risk cover / protection provided
controls.control_description:
In case of factoring on 'without-recourse' basis, the exposure shall be reckoned on
the debtor, irrespective of credit risk cover / protection provided, except in cases of
international factoring where the entire credit risk has been assumed by the import factor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned on the debtor, irrespective of credit risk cover / protection provided

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as sensitive exposure for an nbfc, who shall fix board-approved internal limits for sse separately for capital market and commercial real
controls.control_description:
Exposure to capital market (direct and indirect) and commercial real estate shall be
reckoned as sensitive exposure for an NBFC, who shall fix Board-approved internal limits
for SSE separately for capital market and commercial real estate exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as sensitive exposure for an nbfc, who shall fix board-approved internal limits for sse separately for capital market and commercial real

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider dynamic vulnerability assessments of various sectors and their likely impact on business, as evaluated periodically, for determining such int
controls.control_description:
An NBFC may
consider dynamic vulnerability assessments of various sectors and their likely impact on
business, as evaluated periodically, for determining such internal exposure limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider dynamic vulnerability assessments of various sectors and their likely impact on business, as evaluated periodically, for determining such int

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fixed internally for financing land acquisition
controls.control_description:
While the
Board is free to determine various sub-limits within the overall SSE internal limits, the
following are specifically prescribed:
(1) A sub-limit within the commercial real estate exposure ceiling shall be fixed internally for
financing land acquisition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fixed internally for financing land acquisition

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix more conservative limits
controls.control_description: An NBFC may fix more conservative limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fix more conservative limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place comprehensive board-approved policy on concentration risk management, which shall inter-alia include: (1) conditions under which exposure
controls.control_description:
NBFCs in the upper layer shall put in place comprehensive Board-approved policy
on concentration risk management, which shall inter-alia include:
(1) Conditions under which exposure beyond 20 per cent (for NBFCs other than IFCs) / 25
per cent (for IFCs) to a single counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place comprehensive board-approved policy on concentration risk management, which shall inter-alia include: (1) conditions under which exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to an nbfc, both at the solo level and at the consolidated (group) level
controls.control_description:
The guidelines shall be applicable to an NBFC, both at the solo level and at the
consolidated (group) level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to an nbfc, both at the solo level and at the consolidated (group) level

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise both on and off-balance sheet exposures by the nbfc
controls.control_description: Exposure shall comprise both on and off-balance sheet exposures by the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise both on and off-balance sheet exposures by the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered for exposure limits
controls.control_description:
An NBFC's exposure to all its counterparties and groups of connected
counterparties, excluding the exposures listed below, shall be considered for exposure
limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered for exposure limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised as an exposure to the guaranteeing state government
controls.control_description:
9[Note: The exposures offset by State Government guarantees shall be recognised as
an exposure to the guaranteeing State Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised as an exposure to the guaranteeing state government

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from prudential exposure limit
controls.control_description:
Such exposures shall be exempted
from prudential exposure limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be exempted from prudential exposure limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to such offset exposures
controls.control_description:
However, since the credit risk transfer instrument in this
9 Inserted vide the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Concentration Risk Management) Third Amendment Directions, 2026 dated June 24, 2026
<image>
case would be a State Government guarantee, a risk weight of 20 per cent shall apply
to such offset exposures.]
(2) exposure where the principal and interest are fully guaranteed by the Government of
India;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to such offset exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to be offset with credit risk transfer instruments as per principle indicated at paragraph 41 and the indicative list of such instruments
controls.control_description:
Exposures shall be permitted to be offset with credit risk transfer instruments as per
principle indicated at paragraph 41 and the indicative list of such instruments is provided
below:
(1) Cash margin / caution money / security deposit against which right to set off is available,
held as collateral against the advances;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to be offset with credit risk transfer instruments as per principle indicated at paragraph 41 and the indicative list of such instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be direct, explicit, irrevocable and unconditional
controls.control_description:
Provided that to be eligible as a credit risk transfer instrument, guarantees in respect of
paragraphs 30(2), 30(3) and 30(4)above shall be direct, explicit, irrevocable and
unconditional.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be direct, explicit, irrevocable and unconditional

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised on the original counterparty
controls.control_description:
The remaining 20 per cent of the exposure shall be recognised on the original
counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised on the original counterparty

controls.control_objective: To ensure stand fully substituted by the exposure to the protection seller
controls.control_description:
The exposure of the original
counterparty shall stand fully substituted by the exposure to the protection seller.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to stand fully substituted by the exposure to the protection seller

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as an exposure to the counterparty providing the credit protection notwithstanding the fact that the original exposure is exempted
controls.control_description:
The NBFC's exposure to an exempted entity which is hedged by a credit derivative
shall be treated as an exposure to the counterparty providing the credit protection
notwithstanding the fact that the original exposure is exempted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as an exposure to the counterparty providing the credit protection notwithstanding the fact that the original exposure is exempted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than 20 per cent of the nbfc's available eligible capital base at all times
controls.control_description:
The sum of all the exposure values of an NBFC to a single counterparty shall not be
higher than 20 per cent of the NBFC's available eligible capital base at all times.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than 20 per cent of the nbfc's available eligible capital base at all times

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow additional 5 per cent exposure beyond 20 per cent but at no time higher than 25 per cent of the nbfc's eligible capital base
controls.control_description:
Board of the NBFC may allow additional 5 per cent exposure beyond 20 per cent
but at no time higher than 25 per cent of the NBFC's eligible capital base, subject to the
following conditions:
(1) NBFC has a policy approved by its board of directors setting out conditions under which
exposure beyond 20 per cent may be considered;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow additional 5 per cent exposure beyond 20 per cent but at no time higher than 25 per cent of the nbfc's eligible capital base

controls.control_objective: To ensure record in writing the exceptional reasons for which exposure beyond 20 per cent is being allowed in a specific case
controls.control_description:
and
(2) NBFC shall record in writing the exceptional reasons for which exposure beyond 20 per
cent is being allowed in a specific case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to record in writing the exceptional reasons for which exposure beyond 20 per cent is being allowed in a specific case

controls.control_objective: To ensure an nbfc-ifc may further exceed the exposure limit by five per cent of tier 1 capital for exposure to a single counterparty
controls.control_description:
Provided that an NBFC-IFC may further exceed the exposure limit by five per cent of
Tier 1 capital for exposure to a single counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to an nbfc-ifc may further exceed the exposure limit by five per cent of tier 1 capital for exposure to a single counterparty

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed the exposure limit by five per cent of its tier 1 capital for exposure to a single counterparty
controls.control_description:
Provided further that an NBFC may exceed the exposure limit by five per cent of its
Tier 1 capital for exposure to a single counterparty, if the additional exposure is on
account of infrastructure 'loan and / or investment'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to exceed the exposure limit by five per cent of its tier 1 capital for exposure to a single counterparty

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 25 per cent in any case for nbfc (other than ifc) and 30 per cent for nbfc-ifc
controls.control_description:
However, single counterparty limit
shall not exceed 25 per cent in any case for NBFC (other than IFC) and 30 per cent
for NBFC-IFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 25 per cent in any case for nbfc (other than ifc) and 30 per cent for nbfc-ifc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than 25 per cent of the nbfc's available eligible capital base at all times
controls.control_description:
The sum of all exposure values of an NBFC to a group of connected counterparties
shall not be higher than 25 per cent of the NBFC's available eligible capital base at all times.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than 25 per cent of the nbfc's available eligible capital base at all times

controls.control_objective: To ensure an ifc may exceed the exposure limit by 20 per cent of its tier 1 capital for exposure to a group of connected counterparties.] provided further that an nbfc may exceed the exposure limit by 10 per cent of its tier 1 capital for exposure to a group of connected counterparties
controls.control_description:
10[Provided that an IFC may exceed the exposure limit by 20 per cent of its Tier 1 capital
for exposure to a group of connected counterparties.]
Provided further that an NBFC may exceed the exposure limit by 10 per cent of its Tier
1 capital for exposure to a group of connected counterparties, if the additional exposure
is on account of infrastructure 'loan and / or investment'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to an ifc may exceed the exposure limit by 20 per cent of its tier 1 capital for exposure to a group of connected counterparties.] provided further that an nbfc may exceed the exposure limit by 10 per cent of its tier 1 capital for exposure to a group of connected counterparties

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a policy approved by its board to determine the existence of a group of connected counterparties
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall frame a policy approved by its board to determine the existence of a
group of connected counterparties.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame a policy approved by its board to determine the existence of a group of connected counterparties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to supervisory scrutiny
controls.control_description:
The policy framed, and assessments made under such
a policy shall be subject to supervisory scrutiny.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to supervisory scrutiny

controls.control_objective: To ensure overcome financial difficulties, or even the second counterparty's default, by finding alternative business partners or funding sources within an appr
controls.control_description:
In exceptional cases, if an NBFC can demonstrate to the RBI that a counterparty
which is economically closely related to another counterparty may overcome financial
difficulties, or even the second counterparty's default, by finding alternative business
partners or funding sources within an appropriate time period, then it is not required to
classify the entities as a group of connected counterparties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to overcome financial difficulties, or even the second counterparty's default, by finding alternative business partners or funding sources within an appr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be situations where the control relationship and economic interdependence are interlinked
controls.control_description:
There may be situations where the control relationship and economic
interdependence are interlinked.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be situations where the control relationship and economic interdependence are interlinked

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess counterparties with a view to identifying the chain of contagion leading to possible default of all entities
controls.control_description:
NBFC should assess
counterparties with a view to identifying the chain of contagion leading to possible default
of all entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess counterparties with a view to identifying the chain of contagion leading to possible default of all entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute both on and off-balance sheet exposures which shall be calculated according to the method prescribed for capital computation in the reserve
controls.control_description:
An exposure to a counterparty shall constitute both on and off-balance sheet
exposures which shall be calculated according to the method prescribed for capital
computation in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential
Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute both on and off-balance sheet exposures which shall be calculated according to the method prescribed for capital computation in the reserve

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned at the outstanding amount (netting is allowed only for assets where provisions for depreciation or for bad and doubtful debts have been ma
controls.control_description:
i.e., on-balance sheet exposures shall be
reckoned at the outstanding amount (Netting is allowed only for assets where provisions
for depreciation or for bad and doubtful debts have been made) while the off-balance sheet
exposures shall be converted into credit risk equivalent by applying the credit conversion
factor prescribed under capital requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned at the outstanding amount (netting is allowed only for assets where provisions for depreciation or for bad and doubtful debts have been ma

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to be offset with credit risk transfer instruments permitted in these directions
controls.control_description:
The exposures shall be permitted to be offset
with credit risk transfer instruments permitted in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to be offset with credit risk transfer instruments permitted in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assigned zero exposure value
controls.control_description:
The exposures to Central Counter Parties (CCPs), on account of derivatives trading
and securities financing transactions outstanding against them shall be assigned zero
exposure value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assigned zero exposure value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for arriving at the exposure limit
controls.control_description:
Amount of the collaterals with CCPs shall be reckoned for arriving at the exposure
limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be reckoned for arriving at the exposure limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be measured according to the rules set out in these directions, as for any other type of counterparty
controls.control_description:
Other exposures: Other types of exposures such as equity stake, funding facilities,
credit facilities, guarantees etc., shall be measured according to the rules set out in these
Directions, as for any other type of counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be measured according to the rules set out in these directions, as for any other type of counterparty

controls.control_objective: To ensure be added together and be subjected to the le limit
controls.control_description:
These exposures shall be added together
and be subjected to the LE limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be added together and be subjected to the le limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be under exceptional conditions beyond the control of the nbfc, and it shall be reported to the rbi (dos, co) immediately and rapidly rectified
controls.control_description:
Any breach of Large Exposure limits shall be under exceptional conditions beyond
the control of the NBFC, and it shall be reported to the RBI (DOS, CO) immediately and
rapidly rectified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be under exceptional conditions beyond the control of the nbfc, and it shall be reported to the rbi (dos, co) immediately and rapidly rectified

controls.control_objective: To ensure be) until it is brought down within the limit
controls.control_description:
The NBFC cannot undertake any further exposure (at the entity or group level, as
the case may be) until it is brought down within the limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be) until it is brought down within the limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure lead to imposition of penalties on the nbfc by the supervisor
controls.control_description:
Failure to comply with the exposure limit may lead to imposition of penalties on the
NBFC by the supervisor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lead to imposition of penalties on the nbfc by the supervisor

controls.control_objective: To ensure report its large exposures to the rbi (dos, co) as per the reporting template given in annex - i
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall report its Large Exposures to the RBI (DOS, CO) as per the reporting
template given in Annex - I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report its large exposures to the rbi (dos, co) as per the reporting template given in annex - i

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the following: (1) all exposures, meeting the definition of large exposure
controls.control_description:
The LEF reporting shall cover the following:
(1) all exposures, meeting the definition of large exposure;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the following: (1) all exposures, meeting the definition of large exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure also determine internal exposure limits on other important sectors to which credit is extended
controls.control_description:
In addition to the internal limits on SSE as specified in paragraph 24 of these
Directions, the Board of NBFC shall also determine internal exposure limits on other
important sectors to which credit is extended.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also determine internal exposure limits on other important sectors to which credit is extended

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place an internal board-approved limit for exposure to the nbfc sector
controls.control_description:
Further, the NBFC shall put in place an
internal Board-approved limit for exposure to the NBFC sector.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to put in place an internal board-approved limit for exposure to the nbfc sector

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue
to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced and
any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions,
instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
